title: calliandra haematostoma
intro: Calliandra haematostoma is a flowering plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, commonly known as the 'Red Powder Puff' due to its vibrant red powder-like seeds and flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Calliandra haematostoma include its ability to treat various ailments such as wounds, fever, and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infused oil for herbal remedies, and its seeds are often used as a natural dye.
